message:
test(core): e2e restore bookkeeping preserves manual restore checkpoint

New end-to-end test e2e_restore_bookkeeping_preserves_manual_restore_
checkpoint validates the complete restore lifecycle:
- Captures a startup snapshot for a pane
- Detects the restore candidate via detect()
- Performs restore via MockWezterm
- Verifies the preferred checkpoint still points to the original
  capture (not shadowed by the startup checkpoint)
- Verifies a distinct startup checkpoint was recorded with the
  old_to_new pane mapping in metadata
- Verifies shutdown_clean is set to 1 after restore
- Verifies detect() returns None after restore (consumed)
- Verifies the restore banner was written to the pane

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
